creator: kbyanc@posi.net
text:
Port of netscape's remote control program described at
    http://home.netscape.com/newsref/std/x-remote.html

  Notably, let's you control a netscape process from another machine
and uses far less resources than using navigator with the -remote parameter.

  Unfortunatly, the machine I made this port on does not have X installed
so I have not been able to do as much testing of the port as usual. However,
I have built the sources on another unix box with X and can verify that the
program itself does function as expected. I believe the port to be correct
also.

  Kelly
 ~kbyanc@posi.net~
